layman_headline: The crypto market is deep in fear territory — patience is the smartest play right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is gripped by extreme fear, with the sentiment index at just 25 out of 100. Bitcoin dominance is high at 56.5%, meaning money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin for safety. While a few candidates show oversold readings, every single one has bearish chart structures — prices are below their moving averages with no confirmed reversal patterns yet. Jumping in now would be like trying to catch a falling knife.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines and wait. Set price alerts for Ethereum around $1,800-$1,820 and watch for a confirmed bounce with rising volume before committing capital.
expert_reasoning: Reviewing all 8 candidates, the landscape is overwhelmingly bearish. NIGHT (-38.6% weekly) and BONK (chart bias -2.0 with Three Black Crows) are in freefall — catching knives. UB and LDO have bullish chart patterns but are already extended (+35.5% and +25.5% weekly respectively), making risk/reward poor for new entries. LDO's risk/reward ratio is just 0.38x — terrible. ETH is the best candidate with RSI at 39 (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but the chart bias is -0.70 with price below all MAs and only 1.41x risk/reward. BTC dominance at 56.5% further argues against alt positions. The prudent move is to wait for ETH to retest $1,800 support with a confirmed reversal candle pattern before entering.
risk_factors: Extreme Fear sentiment (25) could deepen further, dragging all alts lower regardless of individual setups
BTC dominance at 56.5% and rising means capital continues rotating away from altcoins
No confirmed bullish reversal patterns on any high-quality candidate — all chart structures remain bearish
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — a bounce with volume here would be a strong entry signal
Fear & Greed index — a move from 25 toward 30+ would suggest sentiment is bottoming
BTC dominance trend — any decline below 56% would signal improving alt conditions
market_context: The crypto market sits in Extreme Fear at 25/100 with BTC dominance elevated at 56.5%. BTC itself is showing relative strength (+4.5% weekly) while most alts remain in downtrends, creating a risk-off environment unfavorable for new alt positions.
context_banner: Extreme Fear dominates the market — discipline means waiting for confirmed reversal signals rather than bottom-fishing in active downtrends.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 25/100 with flat trend — no sign of sentiment recovery yet, making new entries premature.
ETH RSI at 39 is approaching oversold (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but needs to reach sub-35 or show a confirmed bounce for highest probability entry.
Every major candidate (ETH, BONK, NIGHT, KITE, MON) has bearish chart bias with price below all moving averages — no confirmed reversal patterns detected.
Bitcoin eyeing $70K rally narrative is supportive for BTC but high BTC dominance at 56.5% means alt positions carry extra rotation risk.
ETH derivatives reset coverage suggests positioning is being cleared, which could set up a cleaner move once direction is confirmed.
